title: Bandit Ambush
description: As you travel along a quiet forest road, masked bandits emerge from the trees. Their leader smirks and points a sword toward your pack. "Your gold or your life," he says.

options.title: Fight
options.description: Draw your weapon and stand your ground.

options.title: Pay Them
options.description: Give them what they want and avoid bloodshed.

options.title: Join Them
options.description: If you can't beat them... perhaps you should work with them.
